chapter.title: The life of abba zosimos the CILICIAN

paragraphs.text: Pau) by name. Theodore was from the Monastery of Abba EuthyWhen I was staying at Mount Sinai I met Abba Zosimos the mios. They wore shirts made from antelope skins. I stayed there for Cilician there. This elder renounced episcopal office and returned to approximately two years; we were about two stades from each kis cell; be was greatly advanced in asceticism, and this is what he other. One day when my disciple, John, was sitting down, a serpent told me: struck him and he died immediately with blood flowing from all his When I was a young man, I left Mount Sinal and went to members. In my great distress, I went to the anchorites. When they Ammonia to stay there, in a cell. There I found an elder dressed in saw me, distraught and distressed, before I could open my mouth, a short-sleeved shirt of paim-fibre. When the elder saw me, before they said to me: ‘What is the matter, Abba Zosimos? Is the brother greeting we, he said: ‘Why have you come here, Zosimos? Get away dead’? I replied that he was, They came with me: they looked at from here: you cannot stay in this place.’ I thought he knew me; I him, stretched out there oa the ground, then they said to me: ‘Do made a prostration before him saying: ‘Of your charity, elder, not be sorrowful, Abba Zosimos; God is helping’. They called the whence do you know me? He said lo me: “Two days ago, a being brother, saying: ‘Brother John, arise; the eider has need of you”. The appeared to me who said: “A monk is coming to you whose name brother got up from the ground at once. They looked for the snake, is Zosimos. Do not allow him to stay here; it is my will to entrust caught it, and cut it into two before our eyes. Then they said to me: him with the church of the Egyptian Babylon <=Cairo.”"> He fell ‘Abba Zosimos, go to Sinai; it is the will of God to entrust you with silent and left me, going about a stone's throw from me. There he the church of Babylon’. We immediately left those parts; and a few
